issue_name: ROAS erosion in recent window vs. trailing 90d
coverage_notes: Campaign-level ROAS and CPA deterioration are covered for last-7 vs previous-7 windows, but the manual 30d vs trailing-90d account-level comparison is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add account-level date-window comparison support for 30d vs 90d ROAS and cost/conv.

issue_name: Budget shifted from Search to Shopping degrades blended ROAS
coverage_notes: Spend concentration is covered, but channel mix shift from Search to Shopping and blended ROAS degradation is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign-type mix reporting with share-of-spend and ROAS trend comparisons.

issue_name: Shopping mix-shift drags overall CR down
coverage_notes: No campaign-type conversion-rate mix module exists yet.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign-type mix analysis for Search, Shopping, PMax, and blended CR movement.

issue_name: PMax budget cut starves automated channels
coverage_notes: PMax campaigns are detected and flagged for deeper review, but budget starvation or share-of-spend thresholds are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add PMax share-of-spend and status history checks.

issue_name: Shopping cannibalises Search and pits brand against marketplaces
coverage_notes: Brand/non-brand search-term mixing is partially covered, but Shopping cannibalization and marketplace auction insight analysis are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add Shopping query theme and Auction Insights analysis.

issue_name: Shopping CPC inflation outpacing revenue growth
coverage_notes: Shopping CPC inflation and YoY conversion value comparison are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add Shopping campaign/product CPC trend checks.

issue_name: Shopping campaigns not segmented by performance tier
coverage_notes: Shopping product tier segmentation is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add Shopping product group/feed performance module.

issue_name: Missing hour-of-day bid adjustments on high-CPA windows
coverage_notes: Hour-of-day performance and ad schedule modifiers are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add ad schedule performance and bid-adjustment checks.

issue_name: Brand Protection campaign with extremely high ROAS but rising spend
coverage_notes: Brand query routing can be audited when brand terms are configured, but brand-defense spend inflation and Auction Insights are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add brand campaign spend trend and auction competitor checks.

issue_name: PMax paused while Shopping is live—losing automated reach
coverage_notes: Active PMax campaigns are audited, but paused-history logic and Shopping-vs-PMax state comparison are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign status/change-history checks for PMax and Shopping coexistence.

issue_name: Tablet traffic over-priced with no device bid adjustment
coverage_notes: Device performance and device bid adjustments are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add device segmented performance checks.

issue_name: Desktop shows higher AOV but no positive bid adjustment
coverage_notes: Device AOV and bid adjustment opportunity detection are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add device AOV and value-per-conversion analysis.

issue_name: Cities with meaningful spend and zero orders over 24 months
coverage_notes: Geo performance by city is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add geographic performance module with zero-conversion spend checks.

issue_name: Cities with consistently high CPA / low ROAS need bid suppression
coverage_notes: Geo CPA/ROAS suppression opportunities are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add city/region CPA and ROAS checks.

issue_name: High-spend search terms with zero conversions
coverage_notes: High-spend and high-click search terms with zero conversions are covered in the search term audit layer.
recommended_next_step: Tune thresholds by account target CPA where available.

issue_name: Shopping SKUs with material spend and zero conversions
coverage_notes: Product/SKU-level Shopping performance is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add product performance checks for spend with zero conversions.

issue_name: Catch-all Shopping campaign with low ROAS needs restructure or migration
coverage_notes: Catch-all Shopping structure and product/search term overlap are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add Shopping campaign structure and product group checks.

issue_name: Negative keyword list not scaled with campaign growth
coverage_notes: Search term waste and intent/comparison queries are detected, but negative keyword list size/cadence is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add negative keyword inventory and freshness checks.

issue_name: Time-of-day performance not analysed per campaign / per timezone
coverage_notes: Time-of-day and timezone analysis is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add hourly performance and ad schedule checks.

issue_name: Revert to last year's higher-intent mix when YoY ROAS drops
coverage_notes: Performance degradation checks exist, but strategic prior-year mix restoration requires historical campaign-type comparison not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add YoY campaign-type mix and historical campaign recovery analysis.

issue_name: Insufficient remarketing presence in paid mix
coverage_notes: Remarketing audience presence and paid mix share are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add audience and remarketing coverage checks.

issue_name: PMax running without customer-list or abandoned-cart audience signals
coverage_notes: PMax campaigns are flagged for deeper review, but audience signal quality is not queried.
recommended_next_step: Add PMax audience signal checks.

issue_name: Last-click attribution undervalues paid search vs. data-driven / paid-channels view
coverage_notes: Legacy attribution model detection exists at conversion action level, but paid-search undervaluation comparisons are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add attribution model and channel comparison reporting.

issue_name: Revive previously high-performing Search campaigns that were turned off
coverage_notes: Paused historical campaign recovery is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add historical campaign status/performance comparison.

issue_name: PMax without account-level negative keywords cannibalises brand and generic queries
coverage_notes: PMax and query routing issues are partially covered, but PMax negative keyword configuration is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add account/campaign negative keyword checks for PMax.

issue_name: GA4 purchase events missing cart data / item_id mismatch with Merchant Center
coverage_notes: Missing value signals are covered, but GA4 cart item_id and Merchant Center data consistency are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add GA4/Merchant Center integration validation.

issue_name: Transactions tracked with static $1 value instead of dynamic revenue
coverage_notes: Always-use-default-value conversion actions are detected.
recommended_next_step: Add special handling for ecommerce purchase actions with static values.

issue_name: Cart conversion value inflated above purchase value
coverage_notes: Cart vs purchase conversion value comparison is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add conversion action value consistency checks.

issue_name: Engagement events (clicks, scrolls, pageviews) configured as primary conversions
coverage_notes: Multiple and unclear primary conversion actions are detected, but soft-event classification is not explicit enough.
recommended_next_step: Add soft conversion category/name classifier.

issue_name: All campaigns use account-level conversion settings — no per-campaign scoping
coverage_notes: Campaign-level conversion goal settings are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign conversion goal setting checks.

issue_name: Conversions stuck in 'Need attention' status
coverage_notes: Inactive/removed conversion actions are detected, but Need Attention status is not explicitly classified.
recommended_next_step: Add conversion action diagnostics/status-detail checks.

issue_name: Google Ads not linked to Google Analytics 4
coverage_notes: GA4 link status is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add linked account/integration checks.

issue_name: Mid-funnel micro-conversions not tracked
coverage_notes: Primary conversion presence is audited, but absence of useful secondary micro-conversions is context-specific and not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Define desired micro-conversion taxonomy before automation.

issue_name: Multiple purchase conversions from different sources counted in parallel
coverage_notes: Many primary conversions are flagged, but duplicate purchase-source detection is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add duplicate conversion action name/category/source checks.

issue_name: CRM offline conversion import missing for lead-gen accounts
coverage_notes: Offline conversion import presence is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add lead-gen CRM/offline conversion import checks.

issue_name: User data / Enhanced Conversions not enabled — remarketing audiences not building
coverage_notes: Enhanced conversions/user data collection status is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add enhanced conversions and user data collection checks.

issue_name: Advertiser or industry verification incomplete
coverage_notes: Advertiser verification status is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add account verification/policy status checks if supported by API.

issue_name: PMax optimised against multiple primary conversion goals
coverage_notes: Multiple primary conversion actions and Maximize Conversions are flagged, but PMax-specific goal mapping is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign-specific conversion goal mapping for PMax.

issue_name: Micro-conversions (Add to Cart, Begin Checkout) kept as Primary after the account has meaningful purchase volume
coverage_notes: Soft or excessive primary conversion risk is partially covered, but purchase-volume-dependent logic is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add conversion-volume-aware primary goal checks.

issue_name: PMax search themes not configured
coverage_notes: PMax deep review exists, but search theme configuration is not queried.
recommended_next_step: Add PMax search themes query/checks.

issue_name: PMax ad assets are weak (low variety in headlines, descriptions, images)
coverage_notes: PMax campaigns are flagged for review, but creative asset coverage/quality is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add asset coverage and asset performance checks.

issue_name: Single PMax mixes multiple brands without separation
coverage_notes: PMax asset group segmentation/naming is checked, but multi-brand detection requires brand taxonomy.
recommended_next_step: Add brand/product taxonomy support for PMax segmentation checks.

issue_name: PMax used as a 'remarketing-only' campaign — incorrect targeting model
coverage_notes: PMax review is triggered, but remarketing-only misuse requires audience signal/asset group intent data not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add PMax audience signal and campaign objective checks.

issue_name: Asset groups within one PMax show large CPA disparity
coverage_notes: Poor asset group performance is covered, but relative CPA disparity across asset groups is not explicitly computed.
recommended_next_step: Add intra-campaign asset group CPA disparity check.

issue_name: Generic 'Smart List' or default audience used as PMax signal
coverage_notes: PMax review is triggered, but audience signal naming/quality is not queried.
recommended_next_step: Add audience signal checks for generic/default lists.

issue_name: AI Max enabled in a Brand campaign matches non-brand queries
coverage_notes: Non-brand query leakage in brand campaigns is detected, but AI Max setting itself is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add AI Max campaign setting detection when API support is available.

issue_name: Search campaign uses only Exact match keywords
coverage_notes: Keyword inventory and match type composition are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add keyword match-type distribution checks.

issue_name: Search campaign uses only Broad match keywords
coverage_notes: Broad-match leakage symptoms are detected via search terms, but keyword match-type composition is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add keyword match-type distribution checks.

issue_name: Single ad per ad group — no creative A/B
coverage_notes: Ad count per ad group is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add ad group creative inventory checks.

issue_name: Ad groups duplicated by match type for the same keyword
coverage_notes: Duplicate ad groups by match type are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add keyword/ad group structure duplicate detection.

issue_name: Smart Campaigns used in a performance-focused account
coverage_notes: Campaign type audit does not currently flag Smart Campaigns.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign type inventory checks for Smart Campaigns.

issue_name: Semantic core too small — keyword list under-researched
coverage_notes: Keyword breadth/semantic coverage is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add keyword inventory size and theme coverage checks.

issue_name: Ad strength below 'Excellent' caps Quality Score
coverage_notes: Ad strength is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add responsive search ad/ad strength checks.

issue_name: Fewer than 4 sitelinks or no structured snippets configured
coverage_notes: Extension/asset coverage is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add sitelink, callout, snippet, image, and price asset checks.

issue_name: Bids too low — important keywords consistently below top-3 position
coverage_notes: Top impression position and bid adequacy checks are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add impression share/top-of-page and bid strategy diagnostics.

issue_name: Search and Display traffic combined in a single campaign
coverage_notes: Search campaigns with Display/content network enabled are detected.
recommended_next_step: No immediate action unless more granular network performance is needed.

issue_name: Dynamic Keyword Insertion (DKI) opportunity for ad relevance
coverage_notes: Dynamic Keyword Insertion opportunity detection is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add ad relevance and keyword insertion opportunity checks.

issue_name: Multiple countries combined into a single campaign
coverage_notes: Country-level targeting structure is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add geo targeting setting checks.

issue_name: Top markets need their own dedicated campaigns
coverage_notes: Top market segmentation is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add location performance and campaign segmentation checks.

issue_name: Ads serving outside the intended country
coverage_notes: User/served location leakage is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add user location vs target location checks.

issue_name: Over-granular location targeting on a small budget
coverage_notes: Over-granular geo targeting relative to budget is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add target-location count vs budget checks.

issue_name: Conversions concentrated in specific age bands — no age bid adjustments
coverage_notes: Age demographic performance and bid adjustments are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add age demographic performance checks.

issue_name: Language targeting too narrow for the market
coverage_notes: Language targeting settings are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign language setting checks.

issue_name: Whole account budget concentrated in a single campaign at launch
coverage_notes: Campaign spend concentration is detected.
recommended_next_step: Consider launch-stage-specific thresholds later.

issue_name: Budget too low for Smart bidding to learn in the niche
coverage_notes: Learning budget adequacy requires target CPA, niche context, and conversion volume thresholds not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Define budget sufficiency rules using target CPA and expected conversion volume.

issue_name: Brand Search using Target ROAS / Max Conv Value instead of Manual CPC
coverage_notes: Value/volume bidding guardrails exist generally, but brand Search bid strategy classification is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add brand-campaign bid strategy checks.

issue_name: Maximize Conversions strategy on campaigns with <20 conversions/30 days
coverage_notes: Maximize Conversions is flagged when value is present, but low-volume suitability is not checked.
recommended_next_step: Add bid strategy suitability checks using conversion volume.

issue_name: Smart bidding (Max Conversions / tROAS / tCPA) at launch without historical data
coverage_notes: Launch history and smart bidding suitability are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add new-campaign age/history checks for smart bidding.

issue_name: tCPA target too tight, throttling impression delivery
coverage_notes: tCPA target tightness and delivery throttling are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add bid strategy target and impression delivery diagnostics.

issue_name: Account runs only Search — no PMax, DSA, Demand Gen, or remarketing
coverage_notes: Account channel diversification is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign type portfolio coverage checks.

issue_name: Ad copy is stale — no seasonal refresh routine
coverage_notes: Ad copy age/seasonality is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add ad creative freshness checks.

issue_name: Disapproved ad extension or logo asset
coverage_notes: Asset approval/disapproval status is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add policy approval checks for assets/extensions.

issue_name: Final URL doesn't follow system recommendations / landing-page quality flagged
coverage_notes: Landing page quality/recommendation checks are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add landing page/final URL diagnostics.

issue_name: Ad headlines start with a lowercase letter
coverage_notes: Ad headline formatting checks are not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add ad text lint checks.

issue_name: Image, price, and callout extensions missing
coverage_notes: Asset extension coverage is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add image, price, and callout asset coverage checks.

issue_name: App placement exclusion list incomplete
coverage_notes: Placement exclusion list coverage is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add placement exclusion checks.

issue_name: Own domain not excluded as referral source in GA4/UA
coverage_notes: GA4 referral exclusion settings are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add analytics property/referral configuration checks if data source is available.

issue_name: Call tracking not enabled for a phone-driven business
coverage_notes: Conversion action presence is audited, but phone-driven business context and call tracking requirement are not explicit.
recommended_next_step: Add business-type-aware call conversion checks.

issue_name: Lead Form Asset missing on a Lead-goal campaign
coverage_notes: Lead form asset coverage is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add lead form asset checks for lead-goal campaigns.

issue_name: Product feed not segmented by gender / collection — wrong items served
coverage_notes: Feed segmentation by gender/collection is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add Merchant Center/feed attribute segmentation checks.

issue_name: Merchant Center has disapproved products (missing price, image, or other required attributes)
coverage_notes: Merchant Center product approval status is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add Merchant Center disapproval checks.

issue_name: PMax audience signal excludes 'Unknown' gender or age
coverage_notes: PMax audience exclusions/demographic signals are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add PMax audience/demographic signal checks.

issue_name: Underperforming assets (sitelinks/snippets/headlines) not paused
coverage_notes: Asset-level performance pruning is not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add asset performance checks across ads/extensions/PMax assets.

issue_name: Paused historical campaigns outperformed current active campaigns
coverage_notes: Historical paused campaign performance comparison is not implemented.
recommended_next_step: Add campaign recovery module comparing paused historical campaigns to active campaigns.

issue_name: Suspect conversion: conversions outnumber clicks on a query/asset
coverage_notes: Suspicious conversion ratios are not audited.
recommended_next_step: Add anomaly checks for conversions exceeding clicks by entity.
